title: Opening for Software Engineer at Lybrate

jsonLd.title: Opening for Software Engineer at Lybrate
jsonLd.description:
Lybrate invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Software Engineer at our Allahabad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Lybrate:
Lybrate is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Microservices

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Professional development and training programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lybrate!
